visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A person wearing a vibrant yellow jacket and a red-and-white checkered scarf stands behind a wooden table. They are holding long metal chopsticks and carefully poking at a fried egg resting on a bowl of rice and braised meat. A professional Sony cinema camera with a large white telephoto lens is mounted on a tripod, positioned at an extreme close-up distance just inches away from the food bowl. (2) As the chopsticks break the yolk of the fried egg, the person maintains steady hand movements. In the background, a brightly lit indoor food court is visible with other diners seated at tables. A smartphone is mounted on a bracket near the bottom right, acting as a secondary monitor or recording device. (3) The scene remains focused on the interaction between the chopsticks and the food while the background environment shows the typical bustle of a casual restaurant with individuals in everyday clothing eating their meals under bright, even fluorescent lighting.
